purpose: V_sub semantic-substitution metric의 ANTI_MAP + RANDOM pool ground truth ledger. raw#12 frozen 2026-04-25. surface-level negation manual design — semantic distance validation은 separate cycle (LLM-as-judge).

validation_protocol_pre_registered: 1. Forward all 32 prompts (16 anti + 16 random) on TRAINED model
2. Compute G_anti = H_anti @ H_anti.T, G_random = H_random @ H_random.T, G_orig = H_orig @ H_orig.T
6. PASS if V_sub >= 2.0 (anti-meaning이 random보다 2x 큰 disturbance)
